ai_cycle.explanation: Price action, macro, and earnings timing are aligned well enough for monetization.

macro.summary: Phase Expansion, MPS 35.7, VRI 63.3 (Watch), Shock 32.9%, Defensive OFF

earnings.summary: 15 AI/semi earnings in 45D; 11 capex-heavy names; next INTC in 14D

guidance.headline: SOXX는 보유 가능합니다. SOXL은 전술적 운용을 유지하세요.
guidance.detail: SOXX, macro, and the catalyst calendar are aligned. Blended score 74.7 with Expansion backdrop supports controlled exposure through the current runway, but not full-size leverage.

brief.headline: SOXL is a semiconductor tactical board, not a generic leverage hold.
brief.summary: Track 3-4Y supply/demand, industry structure, and external sensitivity before using leverage. The current boom still looks constructive through 2027, but SOXL should remain tactical because the market can price the runway early.

regime.label: MONETIZATION
regime.summary: Price action, macro, and earnings timing are aligned well enough for monetization.

runway.headline: Boom runway likely extends through 2027, with supply relief only starting to matter into 2028-2029.
runway.summary: Public demand forecasts stay explicit through 2027 while fab investment and installed capacity keep rising into 2029. That leaves a constructive runway for the industry, but SOXL should stay tactical because the market can price the path early.
signals: Supply-side spending and capacity extend through 2029
SOXL can reprice the runway ahead of fundamentals
runway.implication: SOXX can be held; SOXL stays tactical.

sensitivity.headline: Rates, volatility, capex crowding, and relative strength are the main swing factors.

items.label: AI capex density
items.detail: 15 AI/semi earnings in 45D; 11 capex-heavy names; next INTC in 14D

structure.headline: NVIDIA remains the center of gravity, but hyperscaler custom silicon and TSMC packaging define throughput.

items.label: NVIDIA
items.detail: 60D -0.6% | still the reference point for AI compute demand.

items.label: TSMC / packaging
items.detail: 60D +10.2% | CoWoS, HBM, and power delivery matter.

items.label: Hyperscaler custom silicon
items.detail: Google, Microsoft, Meta, and AWS are broadening the demand map with inference-oriented chips.

outlook.headline: AI demand outruns public supply forecasts through 2027, while fab investment keeps rising into 2029.
outlook.summary: Gartner sees semiconductor revenue jumping to $1.32T in 2026 and $1.55T in 2027, while SEMI still shows 300mm fab equipment spending climbing through 2029. That means the cycle stays constructive, but leverage should remain tactical.

action.headline: SOXX can be held; SOXL stays tactical
action.detail: SOXX, macro, and the catalyst calendar are aligned. Blended score 74.7 with Expansion backdrop supports controlled exposure through the current runway, but not full-size leverage.

questions: Is AI demand still training-led or shifting to inference-led expansion?
Are hyperscaler custom chips broadening the stack or capping NVIDIA concentration?
Are rates and volatility still the dominant constraint on SOXL leverage?

signals: Phase Expansion, MPS 35.7, VRI 63.3 (Watch), Shock 32.9%, Defensive OFF
15 AI/semi earnings in 45D; 11 capex-heavy names; next INTC in 14D

leadership.summary: The semi group is constructive, but breadth is not yet strong enough to call it a full-cycle confirmation.

summary.summary: The semi group is constructive, but breadth is not yet strong enough to call it a full-cycle confirmation.

supply_demand_outlook.headline: AI 수요는 2027년까지 공식 공급 전망을 앞서며, 팹 투자는 2029년까지 계속 증가합니다.
supply_demand_outlook.summary: Gartner는 반도체 매출이 2026년 1.32조 달러, 2027년 1.55조 달러로 급증할 것으로 전망합니다. SEMI 데이터는 300mm 팹 장비 투자가 2029년까지 계속 증가할 것을 보여줍니다. 이는 사이클이 건설적으로 유지됨을 의미하지만, 레버리지는 여전히 전술적으로 운용해야 합니다.

cards.label: 산업 수요 2026
cards.detail: Gartner: 2026년 반도체 매출 전망 1.32조 달러, 2025년 실적(8,053억 달러) 대비 +64% YoY. AI 반도체가 2026년 매출의 약 30%를 차지합니다.

cards.label: 수요 런웨이 2027
cards.detail: Gartner: 2027년 전망은 추가 +17.8% YoY를 시사하며, 메모리 가격 완화는 2027년 후반까지 예상되지 않습니다.

cards.label: TSMC / AI 프록시
cards.detail: TSMC는 2029년까지 총 매출이 연 25% 복리 성장 가능하다고 밝혔으며, AI 가속기 매출은 중간~고위 50% CAGR 범위로 성장할 것으로 전망합니다.

cards.label: 공급 CAPEX & 캐파
cards.detail: SEMI: 2026~2029년 300mm 팹 장비 투자 총액 6,110억 달러, 설치 300mm 캐파는 2026년 6% 성장 후 2029년까지 연간 약 7% 증가합니다.

chart.note: 수요 전망은 현재 2027년까지 명확하며, 공급 측 투자와 캐파 확충은 2029년까지 이어집니다.

sources.name: SEMI installed 300mm capacity
sources.details: +6% in 2026 and roughly +7% annually from 2027 through 2029.

notes: 수요 전망은 2027년까지 공식 데이터가 있으며, 2028~2029년 수요는 공급 측 압력만 표시하고 매출 수치는 추정하지 않습니다.
TSMC의 장기 CAGR 발언은 리더십 프록시이며, 실제 산업 전망치가 아닙니다.
이 블록은 의도적으로 전망 중심입니다: 현재 사이클이 얼마나 지속 가능한지 판단하기 위한 참고 자료입니다.

runway.headline: 붐 런웨이는 2027년까지 이어질 가능성이 높으며, 공급 완화 효과는 2028~2029년부터 나타납니다.
runway.summary: 공식 수요 전망은 2027년까지 명확하게 유지되고, 팹 투자와 설치 캐파는 2029년까지 계속 증가합니다. 이는 반도체 산업에 건설적인 런웨이를 제공하지만, 시장이 이 경로를 미리 가격에 반영할 수 있으므로 SOXL은 전술적 포지션에 머물러야 합니다.
signals: 공급 측 투자와 캐파 확충은 2029년까지 이어집니다
SOXL은 펀더멘털보다 먼저 런웨이를 가격에 반영할 수 있습니다
runway.implication: SOXX는 계속 보유 가능합니다. SOXL은 전술적 운용을 유지하세요.

model.name: semi_cycle_leadership_map
notes: Current score blends price, macro, and earnings/capex proxy layers.
Earnings overlay uses the next 45 days of AI/semi earnings as a confirmation proxy, not a true revisions feed.
Leadership chart normalizes SOXX, NVDA, TSM, AVGO, MU, AMD, and an AMAT/LRCX/KLAC basket to base 100.
Supply/demand outlook uses Gartner semiconductor revenue forecasts and SEMI 300mm fab equipment/capacity outlooks.
Runway view summarizes the 2027+ boom horizon and the 2028-2029 supply build-out.
SOXX exists in ohlcv_daily and is the primary signal source.
AI Cycle Score v1 blends price, macro, and earnings overlay layers.
SOXL proxy drawdown is estimated from SOXX drawdown x 3.
The leadership chart focuses on SOXX, NVDA, TSM, AVGO, MU, AMD, and the AMAT/LRCX/KLAC basket.
The supply/demand outlook block is built from official Gartner and SEMI forecast anchors through 2029.
The runway block is a lightweight estimate of how long the current boom can stay constructive.
